title: buena obtusifolia
intro: Buena obtusifolia, also known as the rough-leaved buena or rough-leaved wood's rose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. This plant is primarily recognized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Buena obtusifolia include treating various ailments such as fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in traditional medicine to alleviate digestive problems and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Buena obtusifolia often include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
